query:
-- Buscar o cartão de fidelidade do cliente
SELECT lc.id, lc.customerPhone, lc.stamps, lc.totalStampsEarned, lc.couponsEarned, lc.activeCouponId
FROM loyalty_cards lc
WHERE lc.customerPhone LIKE '%88999290000%' OR lc.customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';
